Guideline: Mixed: informal je/jij in many contexts alongside formal u/uw in others. The informal register is more frequent but should ideally be standardized.
Standard Dutch. Medewerkers (gender-neutral) and werknemers used interchangeably for workers.
Dutch rules: first word and proper nouns.
Standard double quotes. Some inconsistency in widget name placement (before/after widget).
Dutch compounds as single words or hyphenated: Gedragsbibliotheken, Widget-instellingen, Startpagina-widgets, Veldgedrag. Hyphen where clarity requires it.
Many retained: Check-in(s), Widget, Analytics Hub, Feedback, Chat, Benchmarking, Data Modeler, PII, API, CSV, SFTP, Proxy. Adapted: Uploaden, Gedeactiveerd.
Infinitive for buttons: Publiceren, Annuleren, Vernieuwen. Imperative for instructions: Selecteer..., Definieer...
Enable: Schakel de functie X in or Schakel de widget X in (separable verb). Confirmations: Weet je zeker dat je ... wilt ...? Success: ...is succesvol... Empty states: Nog geen...

Check-in=Check-in; Review=Beoordeling; Goal=Doel; Worker=Medewerker/Werknemer; Manager=Manager; Compensation=Vergoeding/Compensatie (inconsistent); Behavior=Gedraging; Career Development=Carriereontwikkeling/Loopbaanontwikkeling (both used); Settings=Instellingen; Library=Bibliotheek
